name: Build wheels

# change to a .yaml file if you actually want to use this. Not enabling right now. Need to get sparrow and finches on pypi and then this. 

on: 
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build_wheels:
    name: ${{ matrix.os }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-13, macos-14, windows-latest]
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      # Required for Linux aarch64 cross-compilation
      - name: Set up QEMU
        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
        uses: docker/setup-qemu-action@v3
        with:
          platforms: all

      - uses: pypa/cibuildwheel@v2.21.0
        env:
          CIBW_BUILD: "cp39-* cp310-* cp311-* cp312-* cp313-*"
          # Removed *-musllinux_* to ensure Alpine Linux compatibility
          CIBW_SKIP: "*_i686 *-win32"
          # Enabled Linux aarch64 build
          CIBW_ARCHS_LINUX: "auto aarch64"
          # Enabled Windows ARM64 build
          CIBW_ARCHS_WINDOWS: "auto ARM64"
          # CIBW_ARCHS_MACOS removed to allow auto native builds for macos-13 (x86_64) and macos-14 (arm64)

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: wheels-${{ matrix.os }}
          path: ./wheelhouse/*.whl

  build_sdist:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with: { python-version: "3.11" }
      - run: pip install build && python -m build --sdist
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with: { name: sdist, path: dist/*.tar.gz }
